# mcp-coda

> MCP server for the Coda API -- 54 tools, 12 resources, and 5 prompts covering docs, pages, tables, rows, formulas, controls, permissions, folders, publishing, automations, and analytics.

mcp-coda is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that wraps the Coda REST API v1. It provides 54 tools for CRUD operations across all Coda resource types, 12 resources for ambient context (both live API data and static knowledge), and 5 prompt templates for common workflows. Built with FastMCP, httpx, and Pydantic. Requires Python >= 3.10.

- Install: `uvx mcp-coda`
- Package: `pip install mcp-coda` or `uv pip install mcp-coda`
- Registry name: `io.github.vish288/mcp-coda`
- License: MIT
- Transport: stdio (default), SSE, or streamable-http

## Configuration

| Variable | Required | Description |
|----------|----------|-------------|
| `CODA_API_TOKEN` | Yes | Coda API token (also accepts `CODA_TOKEN` or `CODA_PAT`) |
| `CODA_READ_ONLY` | No | Set to `true` to disable write operations |
| `CODA_BASE_URL` | No | API base URL (default: `https://coda.io/apis/v1`) |
| `CODA_TIMEOUT` | No | Request timeout in seconds (default: 30) |
| `CODA_SSL_VERIFY` | No | Set to `false` to skip SSL verification |

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/vish288/mcp-coda#readme): Full documentation with setup guides, tool reference, usage examples, and security considerations
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/mcp-coda/): Package page with version history
- [GitHub](https://github.com/vish288/mcp-coda): Source code, issues, and contributions

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://github.com/vish288/mcp-coda/releases): Release notes and version history
- [MCP Registry](https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io): MCP server registry listing
- [Coda API Reference](https://coda.io/developers/apis/v1): Upstream Coda REST API documentation
- [MCP Specification](https://modelcontextprotocol.io): Model Context Protocol specification
